subject: Mr. Buu — a large pink rotund figure with antennae, wearing yellow and white, in an aggressive charging pose with pink energy crackling around him
description: A large, round, pink-skinned figure dominates the frame in a wide aggressive stance. The figure has stubby antennae on the top of the head and is dressed in a yellow-and-white outfit. Pink and white energy crackles and swirls outward from the figure in all directions, filling the background with kinetic energy discharge. The expression visible on the face is intense — eyes narrowed or wide in battle fury. The composition is a close mid-shot that emphasizes the figure's mass and power, with the energy aura making the already-large form feel even more imposing.
foreground: Large pink rotund fighter with antennae in aggressive stance, pink energy aura blazing
background: Pink and white energy discharge and swirling aura
